architecture.summary: Split monolithic LLM call into 2 parallel calls (body + evals). Parallelize generate-all with existing Semaphore from concurrency.ts. New batch-eval-runner.ts for Anthropic Batch API. All changes in existing vskill eval architecture.

integrations.summary: Anthropic Messages Batch API (new integration). Existing providers (claude-cli, codex-cli, gemini-cli, ollama, openrouter) unchanged. MCP detector already exists for integration test generation. Auto-prefer API when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set for batch ops.

ui-ux.summary: N/A - CLI-only changes. No UI components affected. SSE progress events for skill-create-routes already exist and will be preserved.

performance.summary: Core goal: 30-40% wall-time reduction for single skill gen, 3-5x batch speedup, 50% cost savings via batch API. Concurrency defaults: 3 for API, 1 for CLI. Polling: 5s initial, 15s after 60s, 30s after 5min.

security.summary: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY already handled by existing llm.ts. No new secrets. Credentials for integration tests use existing credential-resolver.ts. No new auth surfaces.

edge-cases.summary: Batch API fallback to sequential on submission failure. Skills without MCP skip integration section. Parallel LLM call failure: if one fails, degrade gracefully (use whatever succeeded). --batch flag is opt-in for CI/non-interactive.
